purpose: Iteration 96 captures and wires rocprofv3 kernel-trace evidence for the native c=8 Qwen/PARO 512/128 path. The retained bench now sees profiler.status=captured and complete scaling references, but the row remains blocked by non-profiler retained gates.

commands.profiler: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-profile/2026-06-02-native-c8-profile-iter96 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --batch-sample-mode batched_lm_head --batch-sample-eq-ok --batch-sample-eq-artifact benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-c8-native-batch-sampler-equality.json --batch-sample-eq-rows 8 --c1-baseline-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c8-scaling-baselines/c1-native-512x128-baseline.json --serial-bridge-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c8-scaling-baselines/c8-serial-bridge-512x128-baseline.json --primitive-correctness-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c8-profile-evidence/primitive-c8.json --profiler-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c8-profile-evidence/profiler-c8.json --json benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c8-profile-evidence/profiled-retained-c8.json
